title: A new cryptool.io, built around one-click crypto management
content_html:
Visit cryptool.io today and the message is finally in one place: one-click crypto management, built for individual investors and fund managers alike.

The new landing page is the first public-facing piece of the platform. It answers the only question that matters to a first-time visitor, what does Cryptool do and who is it for, and it does so in seconds.

The modules behind the site follow over the coming weeks.
author: Cryptool
